title: EXIT — 'next week?'
prompt: Wide shot in the parking lot just outside @costco-entrance, golden afternoon light, polished concrete and a few empty parked cars in the deep distance. @Mama in the CENTER pushes a cart heaped with a mountain of coffee bags, smiling tiredly. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT stand right beside the cart, each licking a strawberry-vanilla ice cream cone. NO other people anywhere in frame, completely empty parking lot otherwise. Eva (mid-lick, hopeful): "Mama? Can we come back NEXT WEEK?" Mama (laughing, exhausted, content): "Only if I run out of coffee again." Sara (immediate, suspicious): "...we'll see about that."
